title: USDC and CCTP are coming soon to @pharos_network!

title: haSUI Multiply is now live on @CurrentSUI. 💧♻️
snippet: Haedal🦦 (@HaedalProtocol): haSUI Multiply is now live on @CurrentSUI. 💧♻️ Shoutout to Current for supporting it in production right from its official mainnet launch — automated compounding loops enable more efficient yield generation. A new way to put your haSUI to work. 🌊🦦
